---
title: "dsci_II_project"
author: "Heather Lu"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)      
library(caret)          
library(glmnet)         
library(mgcv)           
library(earth)          
library(randomForest)   
library(gbm)            
library(gtsummary)      
library(corrplot)       
library(ggplot2)        
```

# Load data
```{r}
load("datA.RData")
str(datA)
sum(is.na(datA))

# fix variable types
datA <- datA |> 
  mutate(
    menopause = as.factor(menopause),
    race = as.factor(race),
    tumor_grade = as.factor(tumor_grade),
    ER = as.factor(ER),
    PR = as.factor(PR),
    HER2 = as.factor(HER2),
    stage = as.factor(stage),
    surgery = as.factor(surgery),
    chemo = as.factor(chemo),
    hormonal_therapy = as.factor(hormonal_therapy)
  )
```

# EDA

```{r}
# check outcome distribution 
hist(datA$log_PFS, main = "Distribution of Log_PFS", xlab = "log_PFS")

```
